feat.name: Parry and Riposte
feat.text: Your parries and finishers allow you to riposte with the slightest provocation. You can use Opportune Riposte against an enemy who fails at a Strike against you (not just critically fails), provided you have both damaged that creature with a finisher on your last turn and currently have a circumstance bonus to AC from the parry weapon trait, or Extravagant Parry.

traits.name: Swashbuckler
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the swashbuckler class.
